'''SyntheCure''' was a medical equipment manufacturing company. They specialized in the production of [[Plasto-Cast]]. SyntheCure was also involved in producing dispensers for their product, which allowed for plasto-cast to be sprayed onto a broken [[Limb/Legends|limb]].

{{Company-stub}}
